variables.notes: R:c. Used 'Interest expenses' as the primary recurring interest expense line. Also added 'Interest Expense/Income - Net' from the income statement outside the candidate list because 2025 appears to report net interest under that changed label while the candidate labels are blank. Manual review is needed because the outside-candidate label is net rather than pure expense, creating possible sign/scope inconsistency across years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest Expense/Income - Net
